title: Ensure Security Defaults are disabled on Azure Active Directory
details: Security Defaults status requires Policy.Read.All scope. Configure [graph_auth] in cis_audit.toml for automated evaluation. Manual check: Entra ID → Properties → Manage Security Defaults.

title: Ensure that 'Multi-Factor Authentication' is enabled for all non-service accounts
details: 3 users are not registered for MFA: alice@contoso.example, bob@contoso.example, charlie@contoso.example.

title: Ensure that 'Allow users to remember multi-factor authentication on trusted devices' is disabled
details: This setting lives in the deprecated per-user MFA portal and has no stable Graph API surface. Manual check: aka.ms/mfasettings → service settings → trusted devices.

title: Ensure that 'Guest users access restrictions' are set to 'Guest user access is restricted to properties and memberships of their own directory objects'
details: Guest access is restricted to own objects only.

title: Ensure that 'Guest invite restrictions' are set to 'Only users assigned to specific admin roles can invite guest users'
